case_title: CAROLE LYN DAVIDSON VS. BARBARA OLEKSIW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-31-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR LAST PROGESS TO MARCH 2, 2106 AT 8:30AM. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 3/2/16, CASE TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-02-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DAVIDSON, CAROLE LYN AS TO DEFENDANT OLEKSIW, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
